deep_dive.title: Input-to-State Stability Implications in Contraction Theory
deep_dive.abstract: For nonlinear control systems on normed vector spaces, we characterize an incremental input-to-state stability (ISS) type property in which the overshoot constant multiplies both the initial-condition and the input terms. Working through the associated variational system, we show that two properties are equivalent: an ISS-type bound on the variational system, and the incremental ISS-type bound on the original system. We further establish the equivalence between an infinitesimal contraction condition, expressed through a Lyapunov-type function, and an incremental Lyapunov condition. Each of these equivalent conditions yields a necessary condition and a sufficient condition for the ISS-type bounds, differing only in the input Lipschitz constant of the vector field. When the overshoot constant equals one, the infinitesimal contraction condition reduces to the standard norm-based contraction conditions. We establish these implications under mere continuous differentiability of the vector field, and we illustrate the results through sensitivity matrices and Lyapunov characteristic exponents. Moreover, we develop similar implications for discrete-time systems.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Lyapunov-type function and ISS for dynamical systems
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 李雅普诺夫型函数与动力系统的输入-状态稳定性
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 李雅普诺夫型函数与动力系统的输入-状态稳定性
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 李雅普诺夫型函数与动力系统的输入-状态稳定性
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Characterizes incremental ISS via Lyapunov-type functions, showing equivalence between contraction condition and incremental Lyapunov condition for nonlinear control systems.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对非线性控制系统，刻画了一种增量输入-状态稳定性（ISS）性质，其中超调常数同时乘初始条件和输入项。通过变分系统，证明了原系统上的增量ISS界与变分系统上的ISS界等价。进一步建立了无穷小收缩条件（通过李雅普诺夫型函数表达）与增量李雅普诺夫条件之间的等价关系。这些等价条件为ISS界提供了必要和充分条件，仅差在向量场的输入Lipschitz常数上。该工作深化了收缩理论与李雅普诺夫稳定性之间的联系，为动力系统的稳定性分析提供了新工具。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对非线性控制系统，刻画了一种增量输入-状态稳定性（ISS）性质，其中超调常数同时乘初始条件和输入项。通过变分系统，证明了原系统上的增量ISS界与变分系统上的ISS界等价。进一步建立了无穷小收缩条件（通过李雅普诺夫型函数表达）与增量李雅普诺夫条件之间的等价关系。这些等价条件为ISS界提供了必要和充分条件，仅差在向量场的输入Lipschitz常数上。该工作深化了收缩理论与李雅普诺夫稳定性之间的联系，为动力系统的稳定性分析提供了新工具。

quick_skim.title: Input-to-State Stability Certification via Projection Residuals for Koopman Learning Control of Nonlinear Repetitive Systems
quick_skim.abstract: This paper studies input-to-state stability (ISS) certification for data-driven Koopman learning control of unknown discrete-time nonlinear repetitive systems over finite trial horizons. Rather than proposing a new learning law, we certify when a fixed Koopman-assisted constrained update yields practical stability of the selected tracking error along the trial axis. Prediction accuracy alone is insufficient for this purpose: the selected finite-horizon input-output channel must have a positive margin, and the unreachable component of the requested output increment must be accounted for through a projection residual. Thus, a Koopman predictor with small held-out prediction residuals may still fail the learning-stability certificate if its selected channel is weak. We formulate the selected stacked tracking error as the state of a discrete-time learning-axis system and treat Koopman residuals, reset mismatch, channel uncertainty, projection residuals, deployment shifts, and numerical tolerances as ISS inputs. The deterministic result gives a practical ISS estimate from the initial learning error to an explicit ultimate band. A finite-sample implementation constructs an episode-level residual bound under a fixed controller and combines it with reported channel, projection, shift, and numerical margins. Numerical checks on nonlinear repetitive systems support the predicted residual-to-band scaling, weak-channel rejection, projection closure, and ultimate-band coverage.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: studies input-to-state stability certification for Koopman learning control, directly relevant to stability analysis
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 研究Koopman学习控制的输入到状态稳定性认证，直接相关于稳定性分析
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 研究Koopman学习控制的输入到状态稳定性认证，直接相关于稳定性分析
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 研究Koopman学习控制的输入到状态稳定性认证，直接相关于稳定性分析
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Certifies input-to-state stability for data-driven Koopman learning control of nonlinear repetitive systems, revealing that prediction accuracy alone is insufficient and projection residuals matter.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该文针对未知非线性重复系统的数据驱动Koopman学习控制，研究输入到状态稳定性（ISS）认证。不提出新学习律，而是评估固定Koopman辅助约束更新沿试验轴的实际稳定性。发现仅有预测精度不足，需有限时域输入输出通道具有正裕度，且需通过投影残差考虑不可达成分。因此，预测残差小的Koopman预测器仍可能失败。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该文针对未知非线性重复系统的数据驱动Koopman学习控制，研究输入到状态稳定性（ISS）认证。不提出新学习律，而是评估固定Koopman辅助约束更新沿试验轴的实际稳定性。发现仅有预测精度不足，需有限时域输入输出通道具有正裕度，且需通过投影残差考虑不可达成分。因此，预测残差小的Koopman预测器仍可能失败。
